title: feat: migrate kimi, deepseek, glm to Fireworks
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Fireworks in the text engine
gist.blurb: We've migrated Kimi, DeepSeek, and GLM to Fireworks, bringing massive speed boosts and upgraded model versions. Expect up to 50x faster responses and sharper reasoning across the board.
gist.summary: Migrated Kimi, DeepSeek, and GLM text models to the Fireworks provider, upgrading them to newer versions and significantly reducing latency.
gist.impact: Users will experience up to 50x faster generation speeds and improved reasoning capabilities when using the kimi, deepseek, and glm endpoints.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee and the monitor robot watching a literal fireworks display made of glowing code and text blocks. The robot is holding a stopwatch showing a very fast time. Lime green and pastel night sky.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot watching a beautiful fireworks display made of glowing text and code blocks in the night sky. The robot holds a tiny stopwatch. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and deep lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot watching a beautiful fireworks display made of glowing text and code blocks in the night sky. The robot holds a tiny stopwatch. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and deep lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
